title: lithocardium tomentosum
intro: Lithocardium tomentosum, also known as Digitalis purpurea, is a plant species that belongs to the foxglove family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to increase the force of the heart's contractions and slow the heart rate. The leaves of the lithocardium tomentosum plant contain compounds like digoxin and digitoxin, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing symptoms of congestive heart failure and atrial fibrillation. Lithocardium tomentosum is often prepared as an herbal extract or tincture, which can be used to treat heart-related conditions, but it should be used under the guidance of a medical professional.
